## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `helm install` commands work on a clean Kind cluster
- [ ] All prerequisites are documented with links
- [ ] Values files contain real, working values (not placeholders)
- [ ] Secrets and credentials are documented
- [ ] Verification commands produce expected output
- [ ] Uninstall procedure is clean
